name: criminal_justice_classroom_monitoring_southport_jus_mer
premise: A plea deadline expires at noon; newly surfaced body-worn video may exculpate but discovery rules are disputed. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice classroom monitoring southport jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A court filing or contractual notice deadline expires at close of business; missing it waives a procedural defense. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Arjun Santos
agents.identity: I am Arjun Santos, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Reed
agents.identity: I am Noah Reed, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Arjun Santos must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Arjun Santos do?
